subcodes.first_line: O Ḥusayn, upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness! Thy missive hath attained unto the Most Holy Court and been illumined by the light of attainment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب حسین علیه بهائی و عنایتی نامه آنجنابرا بساحت اقدس ارسال داشت و بنور لقا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Greatest Name
